steps.name: interactable-hotspot-prefab
steps.last_known_state: InteractableHotspot.prefab exists with RectTransform, CanvasRenderer, transparent raycast Image, and InteractableHotspot component. It supports future InteractableDefinition hit-area placement.
steps.next_action: Start exactly one next Harness unit when phases/index.json has no in_progress or blocked phase.

decision_log.decision: User instructed Codex to continue until the final result and always approve Harness work.
Standing approval applied as approved_for_implementation for the scoped InteractableHotspot.prefab unit.

steps.resume_prompt: InteractableHotspot.prefab is complete. Read phases/index.json first, then NEXT_ACTION.md to choose the next approved Harness unit.
